testcase.name: submitToFinCEN_shouldFileApprovedSubmission

testcase.name: updateSubmissionStatus_shouldTransitionStatus
testcase.system-out: 11:26:17.044 [main] INFO com.posgateway.aml.service.reporting.RegulatorySubmissionService -- Updating submission 1 status to PENDING_REVIEW

testcase.name: amendSubmission_shouldCreateAmendedSubmission
testcase.system-out: 11:26:17.057 [main] INFO com.posgateway.aml.service.reporting.RegulatorySubmissionService -- Creating amended submission for: 1 11:26:17.059 [main] INFO com.posgateway.aml.service.reporting.RegulatorySubmissionService -- Amended submission created: FIN-20240301-XYZ789

testcase.name: prepareSubmission_shouldThrowExceptionForInvalidRegulator
testcase.system-out: 11:26:17.076 [main] INFO com.posgateway.aml.service.reporting.RegulatorySubmissionService -- Preparing submission for report: 1, regulator: INVALID_REGULATOR, user: 1

testcase.name: prepareSubmission_shouldCreateDraftSubmission
testcase.system-out: 11:26:17.088 [main] INFO com.posgateway.aml.service.reporting.RegulatorySubmissionService -- Preparing submission for report: 1, regulator: FINCEN, user: 1 11:26:17.089 [main] INFO com.posgateway.aml.service.reporting.RegulatorySubmissionService -- Submission prepared: FIN-20240301-ABC123

testcase.name: deleteSubmission_shouldRemoveDraftSubmission
testcase.system-out: 11:26:17.119 [main] INFO com.posgateway.aml.service.reporting.RegulatorySubmissionService -- Deleting submission: 1 11:26:17.119 [main] INFO com.posgateway.aml.service.reporting.RegulatorySubmissionService -- Submission deleted: 1

testcase.name: updateSubmissionStatus_shouldApproveFromPendingReview
testcase.system-out: 11:26:17.144 [main] INFO com.posgateway.aml.service.reporting.RegulatorySubmissionService -- Updating submission 1 status to APPROVED

testcase.name: submitToFinCEN_shouldThrowExceptionForDraftStatus

failure.message: Unexpected exception type thrown, expected: <java.lang.IllegalStateException> but was: <java.util.NoSuchElementException>
